title: Geissanthus mezianus
taxonomy: Geissanthus mezianus is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae. The Myrsinaceae family is part of the order Ericales in the APG III classification system. This classification further categorizes Geissanthus mezianus into the family of flowering plants commonly known as the nightshade or primrose-willow family. The family Myrsinaceae comprises approximately 160 genera and 3,000 species. This classification indicates the evolutionary relationships among species within the Ericales order.
